pattern: Only the two endpoints matter, so sweep the right end while tracking the best and worst left endpoints that sit at least m-1 slots earlier.
hints: The middle m-2 elements never affect the value, so a subsequence reduces to choosing a left index and a right index that are far enough apart.
For a chosen right endpoint, the left endpoint can be any index at least m-1 positions earlier.
Sweep the right endpoint; maintain the running maximum and minimum of eligible left values, since a negative right wants the most negative left.

edge_inputs.description: m equals one squares a single element
all negative, product of two most negative
best pair is far apart not adjacent

stress.description: random signed array with random m
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 3000))
    nums = [rng.randrange(-100000, 100001) for _ in range(n)]
    m = rng.randrange(1, n + 1)
    return [nums, m]
